machinery_genes.role: Hcp inner-tube subunit (secreted tube), = Hcp2 of the sci-2 cluster
machinery_genes.quote: the Hcp2 protein, encoded by a second T6SS gene cluster on the EAEC chromosome (accession number EC042_4564; gene ID 387609980), was also produced and purified
machinery_genes.note: EC042_4564 = AaiC = Hcp2, the Hcp tail-tube protein of the sci-2 (aai) T6SS. Dudley 2006 (PMID 16925558) independently identifies AaiC as the secreted product of this AggR-regulated cluster ('AaiC was identified as a secreted protein'). Hcp is counted as machinery per the benchmark brief. Highest-confidence sci-2 apparatus call.

machinery_genes.role: sci-2 (aai) T6SS apparatus component required for AaiC/Hcp2 secretion
machinery_genes.quote: EAEC strains carrying in-frame deletions of aaiB, aaiG, aaiO or aaiP still synthesized AaiC; however, AaiC secretion was abolished
machinery_genes.note: Dudley et al 2006 founding paper of the aai = sci-2 T6SS (pheU PAI, EC042_4562-4577 per the strain-042 genome). Deletion abolishes Hcp2/AaiC secretion, so AaiB is a functional apparatus subunit. Tss-family identity not assigned in the accessible literature, so 'family unassigned'.

machinery_genes.role: sci-2 (aai) T6SS apparatus component required for AaiC/Hcp2 secretion
machinery_genes.quote: EAEC strains carrying in-frame deletions of aaiB, aaiG, aaiO or aaiP still synthesized AaiC; however, AaiC secretion was abolished
machinery_genes.note: Dudley et al 2006; deletion abolishes Hcp2/AaiC secretion. Functional apparatus subunit of the sci-2/aai cluster; Tss-family identity not resolved in accessible literature.

machinery_genes.role: sci-2 (aai) T6SS apparatus component required for AaiC/Hcp2 secretion
machinery_genes.quote: EAEC strains carrying in-frame deletions of aaiB, aaiG, aaiO or aaiP still synthesized AaiC; however, AaiC secretion was abolished
machinery_genes.note: Dudley et al 2006; deletion abolishes Hcp2/AaiC secretion. Functional apparatus subunit of the sci-2/aai cluster; Tss-family identity not resolved in accessible literature.

machinery_genes.role: sci-2 (aai) T6SS apparatus component required for AaiC/Hcp2 secretion
machinery_genes.quote: EAEC strains carrying in-frame deletions of aaiB, aaiG, aaiO or aaiP still synthesized AaiC; however, AaiC secretion was abolished
machinery_genes.note: Dudley et al 2006; deletion abolishes Hcp2/AaiC secretion. Dudley further notes 'aaiA-P are sufficient for AaiC secretion', marking aaiA-P as the secretion-competent apparatus subset. Tss-family identity not resolved in accessible literature.

notes: E. coli 042 carries three T6SS clusters; the sci-1/sci-2 nomenclature (Cascales lab) applies to the two clusters on the pheU pathogenicity island. Sci-2 = the AggR-regulated 'aai' cluster (EC042_4562-4577 in the 042 genome) that secretes the Hcp homologue AaiC (= Hcp2, EC042_4564); sci-1 is the adjacent SciN/SciD (Hcp1, EC042_4529) cluster characterized in most Cascales-lab structural work. This instance is the Sci-2 apparatus. The two curated effectors EC042_4660/4661 lie downstream of all three apparatus clusters (an orphan/satellite effector locus), not inside the EC042_4562-4577 structural cluster. STATUS=PARTIAL because only the Hcp subunit (AaiC/Hcp2) and four secretion-essential apparatus genes (AaiB, AaiG, AaiO, AaiP) are named by gene in the accessible literature; the remaining canonical Tss core of sci-2 (TssM/IcmF, TssL, TssJ, TssK, TssE/F/G baseplate, ClpV/TssH, VgrG, PAAR) is not individually named with a defensible quote, because the gene-by-gene Tss-family mapping of the aai cluster was not found in accessible full texts (Cascales structural papers map TssJ/TssL/TssM/TssK/etc. onto sci-1, not sci-2). No sci-2-specific VgrG or PAAR naming quote was found, so none is listed (anti-hallucination). Deliberately excluded: the secreted Aai/effector cargo as 'effectors' is not relevant here, but AaiC/Hcp2 is retained because Hcp is machinery per the brief; sci-1 components (SciN/SciD/Hcp1) excluded as a different instance. All quotes verbatim from the cited sources (Dudley 2006 abstract; Douzi/Brunet 2014 PMC full text). According to PubMed; DOIs: https://doi.org/10.1111/j.1365-2958.2006.05281.x , https://doi.org/10.1371/journal.pone.0086918 , https://doi.org/10.1128/JB.00945-08
